# Demo PHP Framework Laravel --> Project Product API 

Ubuntu 22.04
PHP 8.1
Composer 2.2.6
Laravel Framework 10.50.2

1. CÀI ĐẶT NHANH
composer create-project laravel/laravel product-api
cd product-api

composer require tymon/jwt-auth
php artisan jwt:secret
🗄️ 2.DATABASE
Migration users (thêm role)
$table->string('role')->default('user');
Migration products
php artisan make:model Product -m
Schema::create('products', function (Blueprint $table) {
    $table->id();
    $table->string('name');
    $table->decimal('price', 10, 2);
    $table->integer('quantity');
    $table->timestamps();
});
php artisan migrate
🔐 3. AUTH (JWT)
config/auth.php
'defaults' => [
    'guard' => 'api',
],

'guards' => [
    'api' => [
        'driver' => 'jwt',
        'provider' => 'users',
    ],
],
AuthController.php
namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class AuthController extends Controller
{
    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->only('email', 'password');

        if (!$token = auth()->attempt($credentials)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Invalid credentials'
            ], 401);
        }

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'token' => $token,
            'user' => auth()->user()
        ]);
    }
}
🛡️ 4. ROLE MIDDLEWARE
php artisan make:middleware RoleMiddleware
app/Http/Middleware/RoleMiddleware.php
namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;

class RoleMiddleware
{
    public function handle($request, Closure $next, ...$roles)
    {
        $user = auth()->user();

        if (!$user || !in_array($user->role, $roles)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Forbidden'
            ], 403);
        }

        return $next($request);
    }
}
Kernel.php
'role' => \App\Http\Middleware\RoleMiddleware::class,
📦 5. PRODUCT API
php artisan make:controller ProductController
ProductController.php
namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Product;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class ProductController extends Controller
{
    // GET /products
    public function index()
    {
        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => Product::all()
        ]);
    }

    // POST /products (admin only)
    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'name' => 'required',
            'price' => 'required|numeric|min:1',
            'quantity' => 'required|integer|min:0'
        ]);

        $exists = Product::where('name', $request->name)->first();
        if ($exists) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Product already exists'
            ]);
        }

        $product = Product::create($request->all());

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => $product
        ]);
    }

    // PUT /products/{id}
    public function update(Request $request, $id)
    {
        $product = Product::findOrFail($id);
        $product->update($request->all());

        return response()->json(['success' => true]);
    }

    // DELETE /products/{id}
    public function destroy($id)
    {
        Product::destroy($id);
        return response()->json(['success' => true]);
    }
}
🧭 6. ROUTES
routes/api.php
use App\Http\Controllers\AuthController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ProductController;

Route::post('/login', [AuthController::class, 'login']);

Route::middleware(['auth:api'])->group(function () {

    Route::get('/products', [ProductController::class, 'index']);

    Route::middleware(['role:admin'])->group(function () {
        Route::post('/products', [ProductController::class, 'store']);
        Route::put('/products/{id}', [ProductController::class, 'update']);
        Route::delete('/products/{id}', [ProductController::class, 'destroy']);
    });
});
🧪 7. TEST API
Login
POST /api/login
Call API
GET /api/products
Authorization: Bearer TOKEN
📘 8. README (copy luôn)
# Laravel Product API

## Features
- JWT Authentication
- Role-based authorization (admin/user)
- CRUD Product
- Validation & business logic

## Tech
- Laravel
- MySQL
- JWT

## API
POST /api/login  
GET /api/products  
POST /api/products (admin)  
PUT /api/products/{id} (admin)  
DELETE /api/products/{id} (admin)


Code hoàn chỉnh (AuthController)

👉 Đây là bản đúng chuẩn + an toàn hơn bản trước

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class AuthController extends Controller
{
    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        // Validate input
        $request->validate([
            'email' => 'required|email',
            'password' => 'required'
        ]);

        $credentials = $request->only('email', 'password');

        // Attempt login
        if (!$token = auth()->attempt($credentials)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Invalid email or password'
            ], 401);
        }

        // Success
        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'token' => $token,
            'token_type' => 'Bearer',
            'expires_in' => auth()->factory()->getTTL() * 60,
            'user' => auth()->user()
        ]);
    }
}
🗄️ 4. Dữ liệu mẫu (QUAN TRỌNG)

👉 Bạn phải có user trong DB

Tạo nhanh bằng Tinker:
php artisan tinker
use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;

User::create([
  'name' => 'Admin',
  'email' => 'admin@gmail.com',
  'password' => Hash::make('123456'),
  'role' => 'admin'
]);
🧪 5. Kết quả trả về (SUCCESS)
{
  "success": true,
  "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...",
  "token_type": "Bearer",
  "expires_in": 3600,
  "user": {
    "id": 1,
    "email": "admin@gmail.com",
    "role": "admin"
  }
}
❌ 6. Lỗi thường gặp
❌ 401 Unauthorized

👉 Nguyên nhân:

Sai password
Chưa hash password
❌ auth()->attempt luôn fail

👉 Fix:

'driver' => 'jwt'

trong config/auth.php

❌ Token không dùng được

👉 Kiểm tra:

php artisan jwt:secret
🔐 7. Dùng token gọi API
GET /api/products
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN

👉 Register → Login → Logout → Refresh Token → Profile
👉 JWT + Role (admin/user)

Bạn có thể copy + chạy + đưa vào CV luôn

🎯 1. Tổng quan API
API	Method	Mô tả
/api/register	POST	Đăng ký
/api/login	POST	Đăng nhập
/api/logout	POST	Đăng xuất
/api/refresh	POST	Refresh token
/api/me	GET	Lấy thông tin user
⚙️ 2. AuthController FULL
app/Http/Controllers/AuthController.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;

class AuthController extends Controller
{
    // REGISTER
    public function register(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'name' => 'required',
            'email' => 'required|email|unique:users',
            'password' => 'required|min:6'
        ]);

        $user = User::create([
            'name' => $request->name,
            'email' => $request->email,
            'password' => Hash::make($request->password),
            'role' => 'user'
        ]);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'message' => 'User registered successfully'
        ]);
    }

    // LOGIN
    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->only('email', 'password');

        if (!$token = auth()->attempt($credentials)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Invalid credentials'
            ], 401);
        }

        return $this->respondWithToken($token);
    }

    // PROFILE
    public function me()
    {
        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'user' => auth()->user()
        ]);
    }

    // LOGOUT
    public function logout()
    {
        auth()->logout();

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'message' => 'Successfully logged out'
        ]);
    }

    // REFRESH TOKEN
    public function refresh()
    {
        return $this->respondWithToken(auth()->refresh());
    }

    // RESPONSE TOKEN
    protected function respondWithToken($token)
    {
        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'access_token' => $token,
            'token_type' => 'Bearer',
            'expires_in' => auth()->factory()->getTTL() * 60,
            'user' => auth()->user()
        ]);
    }
}
🛡️ 3. ROUTES
routes/api.php
use App\Http\Controllers\AuthController;

Route::post('/register', [AuthController::class, 'register']);
Route::post('/login', [AuthController::class, 'login']);

Route::middleware(['auth:api'])->group(function () {

    Route::get('/me', [AuthController::class, 'me']);
    Route::post('/logout', [AuthController::class, 'logout']);
    Route::post('/refresh', [AuthController::class, 'refresh']);

});
🗄️ 4. USER MODEL (QUAN TRỌNG)
app/Models/User.php
use Tymon\JWTAuth\Contracts\JWTSubject;

class User extends Authenticatable implements JWTSubject
{
    protected $fillable = ['name', 'email', 'password', 'role'];

    protected $hidden = ['password'];

    public function getJWTIdentifier()
    {
        return $this->getKey();
    }

    public function getJWTCustomClaims()
    {
        return [
            'role' => $this->role
        ];
    }
}
🧪 5. TEST FLOW
1. Register
POST /api/register
{
  "name": "Hoi",
  "email": "hoi@gmail.com",
  "password": "123456"
}
2. Login
POST /api/login
{
  "email": "hoi@gmail.com",
  "password": "123456"
}

👉 lấy token

3. Get Profile
GET /api/me
Authorization: Bearer TOKEN
4. Refresh Token
POST /api/refresh
Authorization: Bearer TOKEN
5. Logout
POST /api/logout
Authorization: Bearer TOKEN

hướng dẫn bạn đúng – rõ – test chạy được ngay cho API:

🎯 API:
GET /api/products  
Authorization: Bearer TOKEN
🧩 1. Điều kiện để chạy được

Bạn phải có đủ 3 thứ:

✅ 1. Route đúng
Route::middleware(['auth:api'])->group(function () {
    Route::get('/products', [ProductController::class, 'index']);
});
✅ 2. Controller có method index
public function index()
{
    return response()->json([
        'success' => true,
        'data' => Product::all()
    ]);
}
✅ 3. Có dữ liệu trong DB
php artisan tinker
Product::create([
  'name' => 'Test Product',
  'price' => 100,
  'quantity' => 10
]);
🔐 2. Cách lấy TOKEN đúng
Gọi:
POST /api/login

Body:

{
  "email": "admin@gmail.com",
  "password": "123456"
}

👉 Copy:

access_token
🧪 3. Test bằng Postman
Header:
Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJh...
Hoặc curl:
curl -X GET http://localhost:8000/api/products \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
✅ 4. Kết quả đúng
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Test Product",
      "price": "100.00",
      "quantity": 10
    }
  ]
}
❌ 5. Lỗi thường gặp (90% bạn sẽ dính 1 trong số này)
❌ 401 Unauthorized

👉 Nguyên nhân:

Quên header Authorization
Token sai
Token hết hạn
❌ Token không nhận

👉 Fix:

php artisan jwt:secret
php artisan config:clear
❌ auth:api không hoạt động

👉 Kiểm tra:

'driver' => 'jwt'

trong config/auth.php

❌ Bearer sai format

👉 Sai:

Authorization: TOKEN

👉 Đúng:

Authorization: Bearer TOKEN
🔥 6. Nếu muốn test nhanh (bỏ auth tạm)

👉 sửa route:

Route::get('/products', [ProductController::class, 'index']);

→ Nếu chạy được = lỗi nằm ở JWT
